general_notes: All values come from NUBASE2020 / IUPAC isotopic compositions tables. Natural abundance is expressed as a percentage of all naturally occurring atoms of that element. Nuclear spin I is expressed in units of hbar (h-bar) as a simple fraction (e.g. 1/2, 3/2, 9/2). These are fixed physical constants — values from any year are equivalent.

search_groups.description: Primary isotope identifier used to define each row.
Natural abundance percentage and nuclear spin quantum number from NUBASE2020 and IUPAC tables.

validation_targets.notes: Nuclide notation: element symbol hyphen mass number (e.g. Xe-129). Unique identifier.

validation_targets.description: Mole fraction of the isotope in the naturally occurring element, expressed as percent.
validation_targets.notes: Source: IUPAC 2016 atomic weights / NUBASE2020. Report to at least 3 decimal places where available.

validation_targets.description: Ground-state nuclear spin quantum number I in units of hbar.
validation_targets.notes: Express as fraction: 1/2, 3/2, 9/2, etc. Source: NUBASE2020.
